description:
Life science search engine providing access to 80M+ articles through complementary search pathways. Combines
  classical keyword search with AI-assisted exploration, including semantic keyword grouping, knowledge graph
  visualization, and AI-driven summarization. All AI-generated insights are traceable to source articles. Designed to
  support transparent, user-steered literature exploration for biology and biomedical research. Currently in early
  access.
name: Bionoculars
